introSection: Pipeline the Surf Coaster is a steel launched stand-up roller coaster currently located at SeaWorld Orlando in Orlando, Florida, USA. It was the first installation of Bolliger & Mabillard's Surf Coaster product.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In 2019, it was rumored that SeaWorld Orlando would install a prototype "Surf Coaster" from Bolliger & Mabillard. In 2020, multiple liens were filed against SeaWorld including one that discussed a "custom Launch Coaster".

Pipeline the Surf Coaster was officially announced on October 18, 2022.

The ride's train was revealed at the 2022 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

The coaster opened to annual passholders on May 12, 2023 and to the general public on May 27.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a surfboard.

fullText:
Pipeline the Surf Coaster is a steel launched stand-up roller coaster currently located at SeaWorld Orlando in Orlando, Florida, USA. It was the first installation of Bolliger & Mabillard's Surf Coaster product.

In 2019, it was rumored that SeaWorld Orlando would install a prototype "Surf Coaster" from Bolliger & Mabillard. In 2020, multiple liens were filed against SeaWorld including one that discussed a "custom Launch Coaster".

Pipeline the Surf Coaster was officially announced on October 18, 2022.

The ride's train was revealed at the 2022 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

The coaster opened to annual passholders on May 12, 2023 and to the general public on May 27.



Blue track and white supports.

The train is designed to resemble a surfboard.
